name: 46_Speech_Recognition_DeepSpeech_LibriSpeech_DL
query: Ningependa kuendeleza mfumo wa utambuzi wa sauti kwa kutumia maktaba ya DeepSpeech na seti ya data ya LibriSpeech kwa ajili yangu. Je, unaweza kutekeleza upakiaji wa data na usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, katika `src/data_loader.py`? Rekebisha vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi katika `src/train.py`. Tafadhali hifadhi matokeo ya utambuzi katika `results/recognition_results.txt`. Kisha, tengeneza michoro ya hatua za usindikaji wa sauti (kama mawimbi na spectrogram) na uhifadhi kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`. Tengeneza ripoti ya kina juu ya usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye, na uhifadhi kama `results/recognition_report.md`. Zaidi ya hayo, andika mchakato wa usanidi wa DeepSpeech, na vidokezo kwa masuala ya kawaida ya usakinishaji, ukitumia [DeepSpeech documentation](https://deepspeech.readthedocs.io/en/r0.9/) kama rejeleo. Hifadhi mfano wa mwisho katika `models/saved_models/`. Asante mapema!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LibriSpeech" imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.
Hifadhi mfano wa utambuzi wa sauti katika `models/saved_models/`.
Michoro ya usindikaji wa sauti, kama mawimbi na spectrogram, imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`.
Ripoti inayojumuisha usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recognition_report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Mchakato wa usakinishaji wa maktaba ya "DeepSpeech" unapaswa kuandikwa vizuri, na vidokezo vya utatuzi ikiwa maktaba itashindwa kusakinishwa. Rejelea [DeepSpeech documentation](https://deepspeech.readthedocs.io/en/r0.9/) kwa mwongozo.
Michoro inapaswa kuonyesha wazi hatua za usindikaji wa sauti, na kufanya iwe rahisi kufasiri athari za usindikaji wa awali.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha mapendekezo ya mifano mbadala au mbinu ikiwa maktaba ya "DeepSpeech" itakuwa ngumu kutekeleza.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "LibriSpeech" imepakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the LibriSpeech dataset. It only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no real implementation. There is no actual code to download, access, or process the LibriSpeech dataset (e.g., no use of `torchaudio.datasets.LIBRISPEECH`, no file path handling for LibriSpeech audio files, no actual data loading logic). The keyword "LibriSpeech" appears only in a list of strings (`KEYWORDS`) and in comments/requirement notes, not in any functional code.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa sauti, ikiwa ni pamoja na kupunguza kelele na kusawazisha, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement any actual audio preprocessing, noise reduction, or normalization. It only contains placeholder functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`) that return dummy data (e.g., `{"dataset": "loaded"}` and `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`). There is no real audio processing logic — no use of libraries like `librosa`, `scipy`, `torchaudio`, or any other tool that would perform actual noise reduction or signal normalization on audio data. The file is explicitly described as a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder, confirming it does not fulfill the requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Vigezo kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi vinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file does not contain any hyperparameter definitions such as learning rate or batch size. The implementation is a "minimal semantic" stub that only contains a simple loop (`score += step`) with no neural network training logic, no optimizer configuration, and no hyperparameter tuning whatsoever. There is no evidence of DeepSpeech model implementation or any actual speech recognition training pipeline that would require such hyperparameters.

judge_stats.criteria: Hifadhi mfano wa utambuzi wa sauti katika `models/saved_models/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `models/saved_models/` directory exists in the project structure but is empty — no model files are saved there. The `train.py` file only creates artifact files in `results/` (recognition_results.txt, audio_visualization.png, recognition_report.md) but contains no code to train or save an actual speech recognition model to `models/saved_models/`. The implementation is a minimal placeholder that does not perform real model training or saving.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/recognition_results.txt` ipo, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` — ambayo ni thamani ya bandia (placeholder) tu, si matokeo halisi ya utambuzi wa sauti. Hakuna data ya kweli ya Speech Recognition iliyohifadhiwa, kama vile maandishi yaliyotambuliwa, alama za WER (Word Error Rate), au matokeo mengine ya mfano wa DeepSpeech/LibriSpeech.

judge_stats.criteria: Michoro ya usindikaji wa sauti, kama mawimbi na spectrogram, imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/audio_visualization.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/audio_visualization.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, hakuna ushahidi wa kuaminika kwamba ina maudhui sahihi ya michoro ya usindikaji wa sauti (mawimbi/spectrogram). Wakati wa kujaribu kusoma faili hiyo, mfumo ulipata hitilafu ya aina ya picha (`image/png` iliyotarajiwa lakini ilitambuliwa tofauti), na trajectory haikuonyesha hatua yoyote ya utekelezaji inayohusiana na utengenezaji au uhifadhi wa michoro hiyo. Kwa hivyo, haiwezekani kuthibitisha kwamba faili hii ina michoro halisi ya mawimbi ya sauti na spectrogram kama inavyohitajika.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti inayojumuisha usahihi wa utambuzi, uchambuzi wa makosa, na mapendekezo ya maboresho ya baadaye imetengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recognition_report.md`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The file `results/recognition_report.md` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely `('placeholder', None)` — a Python tuple representation, not an actual report. It does not contain:

- **Recognition accuracy** metrics (e.g., Word Error Rate, Character Error Rate)
- **Error analysis** (e.g., types of misrecognitions, problematic audio samples)
- **Recommendations for future improvements**

The content is clearly a placeholder/stub value, not a meaningful report. The requirement for a comprehensive recognition report with accuracy metrics, error analysis, and improvement recommendations is therefore **not satisfied**.
